commits: 167e704f: fix(cli): map EngineError::Consolidator in engine_error_code (workspace compile)
8f451540: style(engine): array over useless vec! in rebuild_projections test (clippy -D warnings)
findings_addressed: Fix 1 — E0004 non-exhaustive match: fathomdb-cli/src/lib.rs engine_error_code() was missing an arm for the new EngineError::Consolidator variant (added during 0.8.12 consolidation). Added `EngineError::Consolidator => "ConsolidatorError",` adjacent to the sibling `EngineError::Extractor` arm, mirroring the engine's own mapping at fathomdb-engine/src/lib.rs:2116.

Fix 2 — clippy::useless_vec (denied by -D warnings): fathomdb-engine/tests/rebuild_projections.rs:302 `let cmd = vec!["python3".to_string(), script.to_string_lossy().to_string()];` was immediately borrowed as a slice via `cmd.iter()` and never mutated/grown, so clippy flagged the vec! as useless. Replaced with an array literal `let cmd = ["python3".to_string(), script.to_string_lossy().to_string()];` — no other vec! in the file was flagged (clippy stops at first hard error; re-run after the fix showed 0 remaining useless_vec hits in this file or elsewhere in the workspace).
additional_changes_made_in_scope: None. Verified per the prompt's VERIFY-BEFORE-EDIT note that engine_error_to_outcome (line 331-336) and engine_open_error_to_outcome (line 341-346) in fathomdb-cli/src/lib.rs use `_ => CliOutcome::Unrecoverable` wildcards — no arm needed/added there.

Verified fathomdb-py/src/lib.rs:184 (`RustEngineError::Consolidator => ConsolidatorError::new_err(...)`) and fathomdb-napi/src/lib.rs:199 (`RustEngineError::Consolidator => { ... }`) already handle the Consolidator variant — no arms added, files untouched.
No other non-exhaustive EngineError match surfaced when running the gate; only the single expected CLI arm was needed.
agent_verify_result: pass — cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings -A missing-docs: exit 0 (final confirmation run); cargo check --workspace --all-targets: exit 0 (final confirmation run). Both re-verified a second time after commit with a clean working tree (git status --short empty).
next_step_for_orchestrator: Cherry-pick commits 167e704f and 8f451540 from fix/0.8.12-workspace-compile onto the mainline release branch; only src/rust/crates/fathomdb-cli/src/lib.rs and src/rust/crates/fathomdb-engine/tests/rebuild_projections.rs changed (plus this output.json, untracked). Ready for codex §9 review.
